title: Energizing Citrusy Crunchy Plain Flour Crumble
description: A diabetic-friendly and energizing Brazilian dish featuring plain flour crumble with a citrusy twist for a crunchy texture, perfect as a breakfast or snack option.
instructions: Mix all ingredients except the butter until well combined.
Fold in softened butter using your hands, just until crumbly and moistened slightly but not melted into a ball.
Press mixture evenly onto an ungreased baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy removal.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on the edges.
Let cool slightly before serving. Store leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature.
